name: @borjie/vertical-profile-mining-tz
description: Live vertical profile for mining-tz (Wave VP-1). Borjie's launch beachhead — the only profile with status='live' at GA. Ships 10 canonical entities (Mine Site, Pit, Shaft, Stockpile, Buyer, Royalty Filing, Permit, Licence, Worker, Shift), 6 mining-TZ workflows (TRA monthly VAT, Tumemadini annual royalty, NEMC EIA, BoT FX, Safety Audit, KYC), and the Mining-TZ glossary. Companion spec: Docs/DESIGN/UNIVERSAL_VERTICAL_PROFILES_SPEC.md.
